narrative:
Archbold Two (precinct in Fulton County) has 944 registered voters, with 43.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.5 percentage points.
